title: Poovayya & Co elevates Mathuvanthy Mathavan to Partnership
description: Poovayya & Co has announced the elevation of Mathuvanthy Mathavan, based in the firm’s New Delhi office, to the Partnership in the Firm’s dispute resolution practice.Mathavan is a 2014 alumna of ILS Law College, Pune. She holds a Diploma in International Business and Corporate Law from Symbiosis Law School, Pune.With over a decade of experience, Mathavan started her career with chamber practice, having worked under G.
